world.title: A powerful bomb has exploded near railway track in southwest Pakistan, killing at least 19 people
world.description: A suicide bomber detonated an explosives-laden vehicle near a railway track as a passenger train passed through the southwestern Pakistani city of Quetta on Sunday, killing at least 19 people and wounding over 70 others, officials said.

world.description: Despite lacking a star-studded production team, marquee actors or the kind of large-scale online marketing campaigns typically used to promote major theatrical releases, Dear You has defied expectations through strong word of mouth, drawing widespread praise from moviegoers, bloggers, critics and filmmakers.
